name: AWS Successful EKS Access Policy Enumeration Attempt
description: Detects listing of AWS EKS access policies, indicating reconnaissance or information gathering activity. It could lead to unauthorized access and potential compromise of EKS clusters, resulting in data theft, service disruption, or unauthorized modification of resources.

rules.name: AWS Successful EKS Access Policy Description Requested
AWS Successful EKS List Access Policy

author: David Agni & Sunil Bharti
